title: Beyond the Model — Why Responsible AI Must Address Workforce Impact
takeaway: Responsible AI frameworks that stop at the model layer — ignoring how deployment reshapes jobs, accountability, and worker welfare — are incomplete governance, not just incomplete ethics.

title: AI, strategy, and the future of work: Oxford economist Jean-Paul Carvalho
takeaway: Capturing value from AI in cognitive work is primarily an organizational and incentive design challenge, not a technical one.

title: The AI assembly line: Strategic imperatives for CEOs
takeaway: Scaling AI across an organization is primarily an organizational design problem, and CEOs who treat it as a technical rollout are likely to leave most of the value on the table.
